install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y git wget libgl1 libglib2.0-0 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
conda run -n cfgpp pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu121 torch==2.2.2 torchvision==0.17.2
conda run -n cfgpp pip install ftfy regex tqdm
conda run -n cfgpp pip install git+https://github.com/openai/CLIP.git
conda run -n cfgpp python -c "import torch; print('PyTorch version:', torch.__version__)"
conda run -n cfgpp python -c "import diffusers; print('Diffusers version:', diffusers.__version__)"
conda run -n cfgpp python -c "import clip; print('CLIP installed successfully')"
local_install_cmds: pip install --no-cache-dir diffusers==0.27.1 transformers==4.30.2 accelerate==0.24.1 huggingface-hub==0.23.3 safetensors==0.3.1 numpy==1.24.3 scipy==1.10.1 pillow==9.5.0 tqdm==4.65.0 pytorch-fid==0.3.0 open-clip-torch==2.24.0 lpips==0.1.4 ftfy==6.1.1 regex==2023.6.3 kornia==0.6.12 omegaconf==2.3.0 einops==0.6.1 opencv-python==4.7.0.72
python -c "import torch, diffusers, clip; print('CFGpp local deps OK')"

data_deps.name: cfgpp-model-weights
data_deps.description: OpenAI CLIP ViT-B/32 and torchvision Inception-v3 weights used by CFGpp metrics

data_deps.name: stable-diffusion-2-base
data_deps.description: Stable Diffusion v2.0 base model weights

data_deps.name: sdxl-base-1.0
data_deps.description: Stable Diffusion XL base model + VAE fix weights

data_deps.name: coco-val2014
data_deps.description: COCO val2014 images and pre-computed inception stats for FID
